channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19710] mmap_sanity deadlock on tst4
item.description:
The sanity test mmap_sanity deadlock when enable just tst2 and tst4 on the latest master branch:

[root@qian lustre-release]# git diff
diff --git a/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh b/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh
index 69e7644f62..da2e6d1462 100755
--- a/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh
+++ b/lustre/tests/sanityn.sh
@@ -886,7 +886,8 @@ test_18() {
                excepts="$excepts -e $(($(printf %d \'$idx)-96))"
                        done
 
-       excepts="$excepts -e 7 -e 8 -e 9"
+       #excepts="$excepts -e 7 -e 8 -e 9"
+       excepts="$excepts -e 1 -e 3 -e 5 -e 6 -e 7 -e 8 -e 9 -e 10 -e 11 -e 12"
        $LUSTRE/tests/mmap_sanity -d $MOUNT1 -m $MOUNT2 $excepts ||
                error "mmap_sanity test failed"
        sync; sleep 1; sync
 
== sanityn test 18: mmap sanity check =========================================================================================== 15:58:23 (1765785503)
mmap test1: basic mmap operation (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test2: MAP_PRIVATE not write back (PASS, 0.0011s)
mmap test3: concurrent mmap ops on two nodes (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test4: c1 write to f1 from mmapped f2, c2 write to f1 from mmapped f1 (PASS, 105.12s)
mmap test5: read/write file to/from the buffer which mmapped to just this file (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test6: check mmap write/read content on two nodes (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test7: file i/o with an unmapped buffer (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test8: SIGBUS for beyond file size (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test9: SIGBUS for negative file offset (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test10: multi-thread mmap access (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test11: multi-thread shared mmap (SKIPPED, 0s)
mmap test10: mtime not change for readonly mmap access (SKIPPED, 0s)
PASS 18 (106s)
cleanup: ======================================================
== sanityn test complete, duration 153 sec =============== 16:00:09 (17657856 
4 S     0   91360   91336  0  80   0 -  1031 ldlm_c pts/0    00:00:00 mmap_sanity
5 S     0   91361   91360  0  80   0 -  1131 ldlm_c pts/0    00:00:00 mmap_sanity 
[root@qian lustre-release]# cat /proc/91361/stack
[<0>] ldlm_completion_ast+0x1f0/0xa30 [ptlrpc]
[<0>] ldlm_cli_enqueue_fini+0xa64/0xef4 [ptlrpc]
[<0>] ldlm_cli_enqueue+0x4a8/0xa50 [ptlrpc]
[<0>] osc_enqueue_base+0x340/0x5d0 [osc]
[<0>] osc_lock_enqueue+0x39c/0x79c [osc]
[<0>] cl_lock_enqueue+0x78/0x150 [obdclass]
[<0>] lov_lock_enqueue+0x70/0x190 [lov]
[<0>] cl_lock_enqueue+0x78/0x150 [obdclass]
[<0>] cl_lock_request+0x80/0x1fc [obdclass]
[<0>] cl_io_lock+0x138/0x330 [obdclass]
[<0>] cl_io_loop+0x98/0x210 [obdclass]
[<0>] ll_fault0+0x324/0x544 [lustre]
[<0>] ll_fault+0xd0/0x4ec [lustre]
[<0>] __do_fault+0x40/0x18c
[<0>] do_read_fault+0xe8/0x1ec
[<0>] do_pte_missing+0x138/0x1e0
[<0>] handle_pte_fault+0x64/0x150
[<0>] __handle_mm_fault+0x1f0/0x32c
[<0>] handle_mm_fault+0xf4/0x280
[<0>] do_page_fault+0x1ec/0x4a0
[<0>] do_translation_fault+0x38/0x60
[<0>] do_mem_abort+0x48/0x94
[<0>] el1_abort+0x38/0x90
[<0>] el1h_64_sync_handler+0xc0/0xd0
[<0>] el1h_64_sync+0x78/0x7c
[<0>] fault_in_readable.part.0+0x90/0x160
[<0>] fault_in_iov_iter_readable+0xe8/0x100
[<0>] generic_perform_write+0x78/0x1e0
[<0>] __generic_file_write_iter+0xe4/0x1b0
[<0>] vvp_io_write_start+0x4dc/0xde0 [lustre]
[<0>] cl_io_start+0x78/0x140 [obdclass]
[<0>] cl_io_loop+0xac/0x210 [obdclass]
[<0>] ll_file_io_generic+0x490/0xfa0 [lustre]
[<0>] do_file_write_iter+0x4b0/0x8a0 [lustre]
[<0>] ll_file_write_iter+0x58/0x120 [lustre]
[<0>] vfs_write+0x250/0x300
[<0>] ksys_write+0x70/0x100
[<0>] __arm64_sys_write+0x20/0x30
[<0>] invoke_syscall.constprop.0+0x7c/0xd0
[<0>] do_el0_svc+0xb4/0xd0
[<0>] el0_svc+0xe8/0x1f4
[<0>] el0t_64_sync_handler+0x134/0x150
[<0>] el0t_64_sync+0x17c/0x180

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
